# Consistency Review Record — 2026-03-02

Work product 13-51 Consistency Evidence. Review of the BMS-Lite SYS.2 SRS
v1.3 against the SYS.1 stakeholder requirements and the draft SYS.3
architecture.

## Participants

System engineer, software engineer, hardware engineer, quality assurance
representative.

## Findings

- STK-001 ↔ REQ-SYS-001: consistent.
- STK-002 ↔ REQ-SYS-002: consistent.
- STK-003 ↔ REQ-SYS-003: consistent at the requirement level but
  architectural allocation is missing (see CR-042).
- STK-004 ↔ REQ-SYS-004: consistent.

All reviewed requirements were marked approved.

Review evidence 13-19 is attached.
